title: ExtraLib
body: [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a071a84cf75714bde606769f94930a500df439c.png)](https://bisquit.host/en) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b99eb4538afa569e8e40580e1f0d658ba537ced2_0.webp) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c791abd4829248bd13ec46eba8a4813858d6e429.png) * Utility classes for quick use. * Convenient thread timer. * Loaders for YAML and JSON with support for asynchronous saving (Configuration). * Database module for creating databases (MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL). * UI module for creating menus (forked from [SGui](https://github.com/Patbox/sgui)). ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65db17eb44c94abfae49e184184143f5f74a8d8.png) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendcontrol)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendcontrol-defender)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/extraquests)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrartp)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunklimiter)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrawarp)[](https://modrinth.com/mod/movelearner)
